lineage.selection_rule: v91 9 baseline + W1.1 candidates passing strict G6 (residual IC vs admitted baseline >= 0.02) AND G3 (per-regime IC same-sign fraction >= 60%)

candidates_admitted.admission_classification_note: G6 strict floor is 0.020; F12 unrounded residual IC is 0.0195, below floor by 0.0005. Admitted on the basis of the displayed-rounded value at W1.4 sign-off; re-classified as boundary by the Week 2 exit verifier on 2026-04-29. See threshold_provenance.md 'Alpha Ontology Week 2 exit verification' entry. Cycle-level evidence will determine retention vs demotion.

candidates_deferred_with_reason.reason: G6 PASS but G3 FAIL (33% same-sign); sparse-event factor; residual IC suspected of zero-observation inflation
G6 FAIL (residual IC = +0.008, < 0.02); slow-variable, candidate for regime gating layer rather than score

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Alpha Ontology W1.4: extends the v91 IC-pruned baseline with two W1.1 candidates that survived the strict G6+G3 11-gate report card. F33 downside_upside_vol_ratio_30 (MF-10 fragility): 30d ratio of conditional std on negative-return days to that on positive-return days. Larger ratio = pricing of asymmetric tail = downside risk premium = mean reverts upward. F12 funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30 (MF-04 carry residual): 30d implied repo from funding minus 30d basis carry, vol-normalized. Larger residual = perp carry inconsistent with funding-implied carry = arbitrage friction that tends to revert. Both factors carry positive IC sign and 100% per-regime sign consistency. Strict G6 admission (residual IC >= 0.02 vs the v91 9-factor baseline) is the load-bearing test for additivity: factors that did not clear it would have produced redundant information at the score level, violating the alpha-ontology §G.6 'combined IC uplift >= 0.005' exit criterion.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by an 11-factor signed z-score score (v91 9 + F33 + F12). Expected: rank IC >= v91 baseline rank IC (0.21) plus additivity from new factors; walk-forward median sharpe >= v91 baseline (0.85); regime worst >= v91 baseline (-2.0); F33 + F12 contribution to combined IC >= 0.005 vs v91 alone (per alpha-ontology §G.6). Falsified if combined IC drops below 0.18 or if either new factor's rolling 60d residual IC stays below 0.02 for 90 consecutive days.

archived_reason: Superseded by xs_alpha_ontology_v1_lsk3_h5d on 2026-04-29 after the W2-A iteration 2 cycle showed long-short top-3 perp construction fully resolves the execution_stress capacity_breach (8/32 -> 0/32) and majorly reduces regime_holdout worst sharpe (-3.05 -> -1.61), enabling lsk3 to pass strict_validation under v10 contract while v_alpha_v1 (top-3 long-only spot) remains structurally blocked by capacity binding and worst-regime drawdown depth. The score function (xs_alpha_ontology_v1_score) is unchanged between the two; v_alpha_v1 is preserved as audit evidence for the W1.4 -> Week 2 cycle path.
